event: View of Fonthill Abbey from the southwest
description: A watercolor landscape showing Fonthill Abbey, a grand Gothic Revival building, viewed from the southwest across a green lawn. The abbey features a tall central tower with pointed pinnacles, flanking wings with Gothic windows and buttresses, and an arcade along the front. The building is rendered in soft pale tones against a cloudy blue and white sky. Green trees and foliage frame the composition on both sides. The landscape is gently rolling with manicured grounds. The style is delicate and atmospheric, typical of English watercolor tradition.

_meta.title: Perspective View of Fonthill Abbey from the South West
